subject: [SO] change the version number to 1.5.4
commit_message:
[SO] change the version number to 1.5.4

bump the SO elalto version to handle the logging issues

Issue-ID: SO-3046

Signed-off-by: seshukm <seshu.kumar.m@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I07e33709574e98654ed77e7992058030ab93fd10

Patch Set 2:

we still have 400 error on so vnfm-adapter

10:08:09.951 	DEBUG 	Starting new HTTP connection (1): so-vnfm-adapter.onap:9092 	
10:08:09.958 	DEBUG 	http://so-vnfm-adapter.onap:9092 "GET /manage/health HTTP/1.1" 400 None 	
10:08:09.959 	INFO 	Get Request using : alias=so, uri=/manage/health, headers={'X-FromAppId': 'robot-ete', 'X-TransactionId': '13f137b7-d05d-4420-a377-2d505d714734', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept': 'application/json'} json=None 	
10:08:09.959 	INFO 	Received response from [so]: Bad Request
This combination of host and port requires TLS.

when using curl https://so-vnfm-adapter.onap:9092/manage/health -H "'X-FromAppId': 'robot-ete'"
it works: {"status":{"code":"UP","description":""},"details":{}}

so let's change oom testsuite and merge this one just after!

Patch Set 2:

Hmm interesting it seems that I'm too fast for this gerrit.

I've just merged:
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/110057

and wanted to rebase this patch on the top of that one so that we can test both of them but gerrit still says that this patch is up to date even through it has the same parent as 110057
Patch Set 3: Patch Set 2 was rebased
